criteria_results.criteria: Copilotの応答内容がMessage Historyに正しく保存されること
criteria_results.evidence: response-poller.ts lines 725-736: Copilot response saving uses getAccumulatedContent() from the TUI accumulator, then cleans via cleanCopilotResponse(). The accumulated content captures scrolled-away lines that extractResponse would miss. Accumulator is cleared after save for the next cycle.

criteria_results.criteria: 同一promptメッセージの重複保存が発生しないこと
criteria_results.evidence: prompt-dedup.ts: isDuplicatePrompt() uses SHA-256 content hashing with per-pollerKey cache. response-poller.ts line 673: isDuplicatePrompt() is called before saving prompt messages, returning early if duplicate detected. clearPromptHashCache() is called in session-cleanup.ts line 225 on session kill.

criteria_results.criteria: 78文字超のメッセージがCopilotに正常に送信されること
criteria_results.evidence: send/route.ts lines 255-265 and terminal/route.ts lines 84-91: Copilot messages are sent via sendKeys(sessionName, text, false) followed by a delay (COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS=200ms) then sendSpecialKeys(['Enter']). This separates text input from Enter submission, avoiding the multi-line mode issue where C-m bundled with text creates a newline instead of submitting.

criteria_results.criteria: cleanCopilotResponseがCopilot固有のTUI装飾を正しく除去すること
criteria_results.evidence: response-cleaner.ts lines 160-178: cleanCopilotResponse() strips ANSI codes via stripAnsi(), normalizes lines via normalizeCopilotLine() (removes box-drawing chars, normalizes whitespace), and filters lines matching COPILOT_SKIP_PATTERNS (separator, thinking/spinner, selection list, pasted text). Tests in response-cleaner-copilot.test.ts (11 test cases) all pass.

criteria_results.criteria: Copilot用TuiAccumulatorパターンが定義され、コンテンツ抽出が機能すること
criteria_results.evidence: tui-accumulator.ts: extractCopilotContentLines() (lines 116-130) strips ANSI, normalizes via normalizeCopilotLine(), filters via COPILOT_SKIP_PATTERNS. accumulateTuiContent() (line 195) accepts cliToolId parameter, dispatching to extractCopilotContentLines when cliToolId='copilot'. Tests in tui-accumulator-copilot.test.ts (15 test cases) all pass.

criteria_results.criteria: 200ms遅延値が定数化され3箇所で統一参照されていること
criteria_results.evidence: copilot-constants.ts: COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS=200 and COPILOT_TEXT_INPUT_DELAY_MS=100. COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS is imported in 3 files: src/lib/cli-tools/copilot.ts, src/app/api/worktrees/[id]/send/route.ts, src/app/api/worktrees/[id]/terminal/route.ts. COPILOT_TEXT_INPUT_DELAY_MS is imported in copilot.ts.

criteria_results.criteria: Copilot用TuiAccumulatorのユニットテストが追加されていること
criteria_results.evidence: tests/unit/lib/tui-accumulator-copilot.test.ts: 15 test cases covering normalizeCopilotLine (5 tests), extractCopilotContentLines (9 tests), and accumulateTuiContent with cliToolId='copilot' (4 tests including overlap detection). All pass.

criteria_results.criteria: 既存のOpenCode用TuiAccumulatorテストが壊れないこと
criteria_results.evidence: tests/unit/lib/response-poller-tui-accumulator.test.ts: 33 existing OpenCode TUI accumulator tests all pass. The accumulateTuiContent function defaults to 'opencode' when cliToolId is omitted, maintaining backward compatibility.

criteria_results.criteria: cleanCopilotResponseのユニットテストが追加されていること
criteria_results.evidence: tests/unit/lib/response-cleaner-copilot.test.ts: 11 test cases covering clean text passthrough, ANSI stripping, empty line removal, separator/thinking/selection/pasted-text skipping, box-drawing normalization, complex mixed content, all-artifact content, and whitespace trimming. All pass.

criteria_results.criteria: isFullScreenTuiの共通フラグとCopilot固有ロジックの分岐が適切であること
criteria_results.evidence: response-poller.ts line 645: isFullScreenTui = cliToolId === 'opencode' || cliToolId === 'copilot' used for line-count duplicate detection skip. Lines 613-616: TUI accumulation shared for both opencode and copilot. Lines 725-744: Copilot uses getAccumulatedContent() for saving while OpenCode does NOT (documented comment explains past Q&A history leak issue). response-extractor.ts line 88: resolveExtractionStartIndex treats copilot same as opencode.

criteria_results.criteria: 送信パス統一後、terminal/route.tsとsend/route.tsで同じ方式が適用されていること
criteria_results.evidence: Both send/route.ts (lines 255-265) and terminal/route.ts (lines 84-91) use the same pattern for Copilot: sendKeys(sessionName, text, false) -> delay(COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS) -> sendSpecialKeys(sessionName, ['Enter']). Both import COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS from the same constants module.

summary: All 11 acceptance criteria PASSED. The implementation correctly addresses the three core problems from Issue #565: (1) Copilot response saving uses TUI accumulator with overlap detection and cleanCopilotResponse for artifact removal, (2) duplicate prompt prevention via SHA-256 content hashing in prompt-dedup module with session-cleanup integration, (3) long message sending uses separated text+Enter pattern with centralized delay constants (200ms) across 3 files. Static analysis clean (0 TypeScript errors, 0 ESLint errors). All 5469 unit tests pass with 0 failures. 4 new test files with 39 total test cases provide meaningful coverage. No regression in existing OpenCode TUI accumulator tests (33 tests pass).
